codeReview.summary: The fix cleanly hardened CompanyContextFilter to reject missing tenant runtime admission handles with a controlled denial and restored the previously failing truthsuite regression without widening tenant access. The implementation stayed compatibility-preserving and the targeted plus gate-fast validators in the handoff support the change.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The security-backend-worker skill still treats frontend-handoff and related doc updates as mandatory even when a higher-priority mission instruction explicitly forbids documentation edits unless the user requested them and the feature preserved API shapes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: security-backend-worker/SKILL.md Step 5 requires doc updates; the feature handoff's skillFeedback records a justified deviation because the session instructions prohibited doc changes and the fix kept existing request/response shapes.

summary: Pass. The tenant-runtime regression was fixed with fail-closed behavior and strong regression coverage; only a procedural skill/doc-update mismatch surfaced.
